0100101010000110 1100011000101011 1 -> sum: 0001000010110010, cout: 1
1111000001110010 1001010011001111 0 -> sum: 1000010101000001, cout: 1
0100101101010011 1101000001001100 0 -> sum: 0001101110011111, cout: 1
1001111000101000 1100010110010111 1 -> sum: 0110001111000000, cout: 1
0010101000101010 0011000010001010 0 -> sum: 0101101010110100, cout: 0
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0
1111111111111111 1111111111111111 1 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 1
0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
